title: CB4 6DQ, East Waste Limited: environmental issued - EPR/BV4584IU/V011
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: East Waste Limited Installation name: Milton Landfill Permit number: EPR/BV4584IU/V011  "
